title: Implement `waystation init`
description: Spec §21 item 1: there is no `waystation init` — the ledger was hand-bootstrapped. Add a command that scaffolds a fresh .waystation/ in a project: config.json, the record subdirectories, an empty events.jsonl, and seed context/reports. Must be idempotent and refuse to clobber an existing ledger unless --force.
acceptance: `waystation init` creates .waystation/ with config.json (project_id from the folder name or --project), tasks/ issues/ prompts/ scopes/ claims/ handoffs/ decisions/ messages/ dirs, and an empty events.jsonl.
Running init in an already-initialized project is a no-op with a clear message (or requires --force).
After init, `waystation validate` passes on the empty ledger.
bun:test covers a fresh init and the already-initialized case.
notes: Finish-V1 phase. Foundational: everything else assumes a ledger exists.
